rationale: Node-specific connect() error behavior improvement; description confirms 'connect is specific to Node', no spec rule violated.
Internal improvement to suppress ns-not-found in dropCollection for unified runner convenience; no spec rule violated.
Pure internal refactor replacing WeakMap with private field for ObjectId hex cache; no behavior change.
Wrapping socket.write errors as MongoNetworkErrors; implementation improvement, no specific CMAP spec rule violated.
TypeScript type signature mismatch (options marked required vs optional) in rewrapManyDataKey; TS API ergonomics bug.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3282; adding unified runner option and syncing test files for MinPoolSize population.
OIDC spec requires handling error code 391 for reauthentication; driver fails because error code is Int32 not primitive, bypassing check.
Internal refactor replacing process.nextTick() with queueMicrotask() for bundler compatibility; no behavior change.
Internal refactor replacing process.hrtime() with performance.now() for bundler compatibility; no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3344 + Improvement; proactive spec rollout adding deprioritized servers support, driver not previously wrong.
Internal refactor replacing process.platform with os.platform(); no behavior change, no spec involvement.
Internal refactor replacing process.arch with os.arch(); no behavior change, no spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3192 + Improvement; proactive spec rollout adding mongo.com to OIDC allowed hosts.
CSOT spec requires throwing when maxAwaitTimeMS >= timeoutMS for tailable awaitData cursors; driver allows operation to proceed.
Migrating AWS signature v4 logic in-house to remove external aws4 dependency; implementation change, not spec nonconformance.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3356 + Bug; handshake spec test failing on sharded clusters, test infrastructure fix.
Internal BSON API cleanup removing NumberUtils/ByteUtils from .onDemand namespace; no spec involvement.
Driver crashes due to BSON 7.1.0 removing NumberUtils.getInt32LE API; dependency compatibility issue, not spec violation.
Build/packaging: adding win32-arm64 prebuild support for kerberos; no spec involvement.
Internal refactor replacing global process with explicit node:process import for bundler compatibility.
Internal refactor replacing os.endianness() with BSON.NumberUtils.isBigEndian; no behavior change.
Server selection spec requires using user-provided readPreference; driver falls back to primary for aggregation with write stages due to commonWireVersion=0 bug.
Build: adding MSVC compiler security flags for BinSkim compliance; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3380 + Improvement; proactive spec test addition for server deprioritization, not a bug fix.
Build: adding stack-protector-strong flag on Linux for kerberos; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Internal refactor replacing Node.js Buffer with Uint8Array for platform-agnostic driver; no behavior change.
TypeScript type regression in mongodb-connection-string-url; TS API ergonomics bug, not a spec conformance issue.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3411 + Improvement; proactive spec rollout for transaction state preservation across retries.
Internal refactor replacing Node.js crypto with Web Crypto API for edge runtime compatibility; no spec behavior changed.
Internal DNS layer refactor unifying resolveSrv/resolveCname into generic resolve(); prerequisite for Pluggable I/O milestone.
Feature request to expose cursor.bufferedCount from ChangeStream; API ergonomics addition, not a spec conformance fix.
Adding driver telemetry metadata to mastra AI framework integration; no spec involvement.
TCP keepAlive regression on TLS sockets after refactor; implementation bug, no specific CMAP spec rule about keepAlive settings.
OIDC spec defines wildcard host matching with dot-boundary; driver's endsWith() allows suffix bypass (evil-mongodb.net matches *.mongodb.net).
EJSON.stringify() ignores space parameter when options passed as second arg; BSON API overload bug, no spec rule defines this signature behavior.
Perl-specific BSON serialization crash with scalar refs combined with numbers; language-binding implementation bug.
Intermittent 'Resource temporarily unavailable' socket error; thin description, implementation/networking issue.
count() returns 0 for both empty result and error due to chunk migration; error handling gap, no specific spec rule cited.
Request to add $errCode to error responses for cataloging; documentation/error handling improvement, not a spec nonconformance.
SDAM spec requires minHeartbeatFrequencyMS=500; Perl driver had 10, incorrect spec value.
GridFS spec requires error on missing chunks; driver silently returns empty file instead of throwing on corrupt data.
C-level pointer boolean check bug in BSON use_boolean flag; internal XS/C implementation bug, not a spec rule violation.
Implementing CRUD write API per spec; proactive new implementation, driver not previously nonconformant (API didn't exist).
Adding optional inserted IDs to BulkWriteResult per CRUD spec; spec marks as optional, this is a feature addition not a bug fix.
Inserting document as array ref allows duplicate keys; Perl-specific input validation gap, behavior is undefined, no specific spec rule violated.
Deprecating last_error/GLE method as write commands supersede it; API lifecycle change, not a spec nonconformance.
CRUD spec does not allow per-operation 'safe' write concern option; driver supported it, violating spec requirement.
Implementing CRUD read API per spec; proactive new implementation, driver not previously nonconformant.
Consistent argument validation/coercion for ordered documents; API ergonomics improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
Adding support for missing query modifiers; feature completeness improvement, not a bug fix for incorrect existing behavior.
